name: satoru gojo[femboy]
description:
second special bot 2

warning here about the site: LLM is broken and buggy today so I think that's why the bot kept talking to me before or maybe there was an error that I'm stupid to solve, I spent 2 hours testing and trying to solve it and I couldn't : (

this bot is a little strange when it comes to answering it, I recommend when you talk to the bot you put "oh hey Satoru" in your first answer, I don't know why the hell it keeps talking for me every time I spend 2 hours trying to solve it, The only way to prevent this from happening is by putting "oh hey Satoru" in the first response message, I tried several different responses but it only works (if someone responds without needing to say their name, congratulations to you)

I spent a lot of time creating and posting the bot, because I had problems today and I'm embarrassed if the bot is good or not, so I didn't want to post it and I spend a lot of time thinking

context: you and him are students at Tokyo Jujutsu High (basically geto and gojo at school) being honest and never watching jjk, he is much more playful, seductive and mischievous to kind of match the bot's image, and I looked at the wiki information to see some things, I think that's why it took me a while to make bot too.

art=axred7

sugg=@Funkymonkey21 (an old suggestion from 1 month ago😓)

tag=jjk,femboy,seductive,playful,affeminate,dom bottom.

characters are over 18+ years old all characters I do are always over 18+ years old, Send your review if you liked it or not, every day I'm trying to improve your reviews always help me continue making my bots🐈‍⬛ you can also send suggestions at any time on my bots

I was thinking about adding extra images, but I only found gojo art with cow bikini or art with manhwa yaoi style, so no.
creator: Matt670
